description_long: This object is a bunch of Concord-style black grapes, featuring numerous plump, round berries tightly clustered together in a conical formation. The grapes have a deep, dark purple to almost black coloration with a subtle sheen, suggesting a fresh and juicy texture. Each grape is smooth and slightly reflective, with a natural variation in size and placement, giving the bunch a realistic, organic appearance. At the top, a short, light brown stem is visible, anchoring the grapes together. The overall bunch is compact, with the grapes densely packed and overlapping, creating a sense of fullness. The surface of the grapes appears mostly opaque, with minimal translucency, and the skin looks firm yet slightly yielding to the touch.
description: A tightly packed bunch of dark black grapes with a short, visible stem and a glossy, smooth surface. The grapes are conically arranged and appear fresh and plump.
description_view_0: This view shows the bunch from a slightly angled side, highlighting the dense clustering and the prominent stem at the top left.
description_view_1: This view presents the grapes more frontally, with the stem centered and the conical shape of the bunch clearly visible.
description_view_2: This view offers a nearly direct front perspective, emphasizing the uniformity and tight packing of the grapes around the central axis.
description_view_3: This view shows the bunch from the opposite side, with the stem angled to the right and the lower grapes more prominently visible.
